creator: jgreco@ns.sol.net
text:
Port fails to compile without libnotify; results of pkg_info included inline.

	The Makefile appears to believe that libnotify is a dependency for NOTIFYEMAIL
	which is unset in our options file, so it should not be required.
	The build subsequently fails with 

	"Package 'libnotify', required by 'world', not found"

	It is also failing to tag "libupsclient" (note the --without-libupsclient)
	despite NUTUPS being set and the appropriate library being installed.

	It is unclear to me what the correct fix is.  If I bang out the configure.in
	section dealing with libnotify, and disable option NUTUPS, the package appears
	to build fine.
